(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta1) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2)) or not continuous_condition(f, x, delta1, eps2) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta1) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2)) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta1) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2) } or continuous_condition(f, x, delta1, eps2)

goal: continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, eps2) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta2) implies g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta2, g, eps2)
not continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, eps2) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta2) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta2) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2)) or not continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, eps2) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta2) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2)) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta2) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2) } or continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, eps2)
continuous_condition(f, x, delta1, eps2)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta1) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta1) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta1) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps2)) }(x1)
not x1.is_close(x, delta1) or f(x1).is_close(f(x), eps2)
continuous_condition(g, x, delta2, eps2)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta2) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta2) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta2) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eps2)) }(x1)
not x1.is_close(x, delta2) or g(x1).is_close(g(x), eps2)

function(x0: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real, x4: Real, x5: Real, x6: Real) { not x0.is_close(x2, x3) or not x4.is_close(x5, x6) or (x0 + x4).is_close(x2 + x5, x3 + x6) }(f(x1), f(x), eps2, g(x1), g(x), eps2)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x2: T0, x3: T0 -> Real) { x0(x2) + x3(x2) = add_fns[T0](x0, x3, x2) }[Real](f, x1, g)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x2: T0, x3: T0 -> Real) { x0(x2) + x3(x2) = add_fns[T0](x0, x3, x2) }[Real](f, x, g)

goal: add_fns(f, g, x1).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, add_fns[Real](f, g), eps)
not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or add_fns(f, g, x0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not add_fns(f, g, x0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps)) or not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or not x0.is_close(x, delta) or add_fns(f, g, x0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or add_fns(f, g, x0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not add_fns(f, g, k0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not add_fns(f, g, k0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta) and not add_fns(f, g, w0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) }
w0.is_close(x, delta)
not add_fns(f, g, w0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or add_fns(f, g, x0).is_close(add_fns(f, g, x), eps) }(w0)

goal: delta.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, k0, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, eps)) }(delta)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, k0) } }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } }
w0.is_positive
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) or not x0.is_positive })
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, k0, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, w1, w0) }
w1.is_positive
continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, w1, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) }(w1)
not continuous_condition(add_fns[Real](f, g), x, w1, w0) or not w1.is_positive
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
not continuous(f) or forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous(f) or continuous_at(f, x0) })
(forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) })
not forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } or continuous(f)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[Real](x)
continuous(f)
not continuous_at(f, x + Real.0)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x + Real.0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(g)
not continuous(g) or forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(g, x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous(g) or continuous_at(g, x0) })
(forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(g, x0) })
not forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(g, x0) } or continuous(g)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[Real](x)
continuous(g)
not continuous_at(g, x + Real.0)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(g, x + Real.0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(add_fns[Real](f, g))
not continuous(add_fns[Real](f, g)) or forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous(add_fns[Real](f, g)) or continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), x0) })
not forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), x0) } or continuous(add_fns[Real](f, g))
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), k0) } or continuous(add_fns[Real](f, g))
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(add_fns[Real](f, g), x0) }(w0)
